privileged_info_summary: R44235 is a Congressional Research Service report titled 'Supreme Court Appointment Process: President's Selection of a Nominee' by Barry J. McMillion. The report was originally published on October 19, 2015, with a significant update released on March 8, 2022 (version 23). The institution is the Congressional Research Service, located in Washington, D.C. The report is publicly available at https://crsreports.congress.gov/product/pdf/R/R44235 and discusses how U.S. Presidents select nominees for Supreme Court vacancies, with information current through Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson's 2022 confirmation.
